feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SEN Public Cloud - Export Remote / SAP Connected Content
entry.content:
Hello SAP Enable Now Master Authors, 

Have you ever tried copying/exporting the Content from SAP Connected (are rooted in SAP and not available Resources in every new Workarea) to deploy in the new Workarea? 

As you can see in the Photo, I can´t open this particular Workarea with Producer!

If you have tried and succeeded, could you share how you did it? 

Any insights would be helpful. Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: Holiday on a non planned working day
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
How can I setup a time valuation to process hours on a public holiday that occurred on a day employees are not planned to work?
Requirement : Employees should be paid for all holidays even if they are not scheduled to work on the holiday.

Using the standard paid holiday time type group only generates hours for weeks which the employees are scheduled to work. But does not generate any hour for a non-work day holiday.

I have created a time valuation that filters the holidays, but I am not sure what the input time type group should be. I tried to use the recorded working time but it generates 0hr on non - work public holidays, since employees do not record hours on those days.


SAP Timesheet SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking HCM Time Management SAP Payroll and Time Change Management SAP Payroll and Time Change Management HCM (Human Capital Management)

entry.title: Digital Skills initiative
entry.content:
My name is Christine, a woman from Kenya.

I have worked in information technology for a few years and have developed an eagerness to attain certification in SAP SuccessFactors. This requires a big budget, especially for me who is a mum and in between jobs.

The opportunity that has been accorded by SAP is incredible, not only to me but for the many who will benefit from free SAP certification.

This certification will provide me with the assurance that I can and will get opportunities to work in implementing SAP SuccessFactors for various companies.

entry.title: How to add all org levels for an employee in Query Manager 4?
entry.content: HI. I'm new to Query Manager 4 and trying to create my first report which would have info on an employee level, but need to include info to which organizational unit does an employee belong and also all upper org levels (e.g. employee XY belongs to department Marketing, but Marketing is under Services sector etc.)? How do I do that? Does this require merging different tables (PA,OM)? How is that done? Please consider that I am a complete newbie to SAP Query Manager.

entry.title: Deductions in upcoming payslips
entry.content:
Hai Experts,

I need to check for deductions and refunded amounts for the next months salary of an employee. Is it possible to check in SAP

entry.title: Claim from previous period deductions
entry.content:
Hai Experts,

Whenever an employee is returned after vacation, there comes "Claim from previous period" deductions in the next months salary Payslip or any other payments that we do for the employee. Let me know:

1- What is actually this "Claim from previous period"?

2- How to know what is this deductions for other that CWTR code?

3- How to remove the "Claim from previous period" from the Payments?

entry.title: HCM My Reporting FIORI App (F4940) - Attendance Check Report
entry.content:
Dears,

I need your assistance in understanding the functionality of the Attendance Check Report in the My Reporting FIORI App. It appears that the report is not reading the TET (Time Event Type) records that are automatically posted in 2011 and TEVEN.

We are using P10/P20 types, so could you please advise on how these are mapped?

For your information, the Event Types are correctly appearing in the My Time Events App, as appears in the second attachment 

Thank you.

 

My Time Event App Screen

entry.title: PFAL HR Master Data Distribution - 5-031 no data to be distributed
entry.content:
Hi guys,

read a lot of guides and community blogs but still following problem on QAS system,
when trying to distribute HR master data (HRQ to ERQ).

Someone has changed something and not working any more, nobody knows, or maybe could also be after last systemcopy...

PFAL settings for test:
Plan 01
Objecttype P
ObjectID 353700
(Company code 0300)
Period all
Mode Insert
Infotype 0009
Receiver ERQCLNT123
Message type HRMD_A

Message no. 5-031
According to the selection parameters and distribution model, no datahas been found that needs to be distributed for the target system.


No idoc were created in WE02/05 in sender system.

BD64 - Distribution model configured

BDCCC
Test 'Check Distribution Model' -> No error for relevant distribution model
Test 'Check/Generate Partner Profile' -> On sender and receiver system seems OK

Test on HRQ (sender system):

Test on ERQ (receiver system):

WE20 - Partner profiles configured
HRQ outbound parameter:
-> Message types HRMD_A with basic type HRMD_A06, SYNCH with basic type SYNCHRON
ERQ inbound parameter:
-> HRMD_A with HRMD

WE21/SM59 - RFC connections are working
HRQ -> A000000001 for receiver system (ERQ)

 

Thank you for take a look.

entry.title: Deletion of one employee number
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I accidently created one employee number. Now the number is active in SAP from 01-July-2024. Is it possible to delete or else to change the starting date of the employee? I am not authorized to use the code PU00. So is there any way to change the starting date. Please view the attached file.

entry.title: HCM Processes & Forms: record several data records with one table
entry.content:
Hi you all,

I have a question about creating several qualifications via a table, for example.
So far, we have used the SAP-PA background service for this. We have created a process via HRASR_DT and also a form scenario. If you only want to enter one entry, it works, but if you want to enter more than one entry in the table, the second entry is overwritten and only one entry is posted in the background.


So if Quali 1 fields are in SAP_PA instance 1 and Quali 2 fields are in SAP_PA 2 instance, then it works - if both are in one then not, even when using different "Data record index" for these fields 

Do you have any Idea how i could fix that ? 

Thanks 
Dominik

entry.title: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content:
i have created a new PA which is showing in T500P and T001P but this new PA is not visible to update PSG grouping for WS (V_001P_N). Eventually not showing in V_001P_ALL 

This PA is created under IMG path PA> PSA  > Assignment of PA to company code. Also This company code is enabled in T500L table 

Please help

entry.title: Extensibility cockpit
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

I try to set up the approval possibility in my Manage My Timesheet app (F1823) with activated scope item 1Q4 Time Recording. 
The Timesheet Approver option can be added via Extensibility Cockpit app (F2866) where I found Business Context HCM_CATS_V1_APPROVER_DETRMN HCM: Timesheet Approver Determination with which I can create a Custom logic and implement this Timesheet Approver functionality into my system. 
My question is, will I activate any more scope item (like SuccessFactors (HR) module) with this BADI extensibility? Or is it free and safe to use? 

Thank you

entry.title: export Cats_da to CSV file
entry.content:
Hi all

i want to create a background  job that export Cats_da job to CSV. how do i do that?

entry.title: Hi, Can restrict portlet edit access using business rule
entry.content:
There are two custom MDF portlets - GMC & Dependent

I want to restrict dependent portlet

The dependent portlet itself needs to create a start date and end date, once these dates are initiated by ABC group, that particular period only employees have access to Dependent portlet edit access.

Note : ABC group people only have initiating start date and end date access, filed should not visible to others.

Under GMC portlet, there is field GMC coverage - if yes then Emp have access only can add 3 Dependent if not only 2 dependent access. like Add dependent child associates need to be restrict.

entry.title: SAP ECC HCM authorisation object P_PERNR with PSIGN = E not working after SP 608/132?
entry.content:
Hi,
we've seen the following behaviour:
Authorisations on Object P_PERNR with PSIGN E (exclude own Personnel Number) are no longer working.
The very same roles have worked well before the support patch level had been increased to 608/132.
Now the access to respective data for the user's own record is erroneously given.
The error seems to happen in method process_only_partial_checks in CL_HRPAD00AUTH_CHECK_STD 

Does anybody else have that problem or even a solution for it?

entry.title: Re: HCM Processes & Forms: record several data records wi...
entry.content:
Problem solved 🙂 
In the end, it's relatively simple.

You only need to fill the HRASR_IS_MULT_PA field with an 'X' as a manual default value, we used the TC HRASR_DT for this and set the Field up in the Back-End Service SAP_PA. THis makes it possible to enter several entries using a table, The Field does not have to be displayed in the Form, i.e. it can be set invisible. The data binding for this field would be typing:BOOLE_D.



And in the Field Metadata you can set this Field up like that:

In the end it can look like this: 

I hope this is helpful 🙂

entry.title: Latest goals management - Introduction description default expansion
entry.content: In the latest goals management, there is an "introduction" button which you have to click to expand to see the description of either your individual scorecard or development tiles. Is there a way to have it display in the expanded view by default?

entry.title: Storing Employee Diversity & Equity Data without Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently collecting Diversity, Equity & Inclusion data from our applicants (on the application) and our employees (in custom portlets in the People Profile). We are looking to determine if there's an alternative to custom portlets for the employee data. Our questions include Gender Identity, Indigenous Community, Visible Minority, and Ethnicity.

Where are other companies (who don't have Employee Central) storing this data?

Thanks!

entry.title: LMS Implementation Plan
entry.content: I have a customer that would like an "example of an Implementation Plan for LMS?" Are you able to point me to where that information can be found? Thanks!

entry.title: Unpaid leave amount not showing for certain employee group
entry.content:
Good day,

I have an issue whereby an unpaid marternity leave wage type is configured but when doing payroll simulation, the amount for the unpaid leave taken is showing for certain employee subgroup but not for another. What am I missing? I have attached screenshots showing the difference on payslip.
